title: Come, Let Us Sing

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Generate with warm tones and minimal high-frequency emphasis.

sections.label: Intro
lines: Come, let us sing with joyful hearts,
To the Rock of our salvation.
With thanksgiving, lift your voice,
In His courts, rejoice, rejoice.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The earth is His, the depths, the heights,
The seas He formed with sovereign might.
His hands shaped mountains, valleys low,
A masterpiece, His glory shows.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, kneel before the Lord of grace,
The Maker of this holy place.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Come, let us bow in awe and sing,
Our God, our Lord, eternal King.
The heavens proclaim, the earth resounds,
Our hearts on holy ground.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He calls His flock with gentle voice,
In His pasture, we rejoice.
Harden not your hearts today,
Hear His call and walk His way.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, kneel before the Lord of grace,
The Maker of this holy place.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Come, let us bow in awe and sing,
Our God, our Lord, eternal King.
The heavens proclaim, the earth resounds,
Our hearts on holy ground.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: He reigns above, the King of light,
His truth endures through endless night.
O hear His voice, let love abound,
For we stand on holy ground.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Come, let us bow in awe and sing,
Our God, our Lord, eternal King.
The heavens proclaim, the earth resounds,
Our hearts on holy ground.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Come, let us sing with joyful hearts,
To the Rock of our salvation.

epigraph: let us make a joyful noise to the rock of our salvation
